{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324104859A99797F6440D9F8D9C69"}"},"total":3376},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7255701608456913721","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看，作者写的题材超新颖，穿越中我感觉属于炸裂的了，开车也挺多，主要有4个男主。嘿嘿，4个男主都好想要，越看越想看，一直不知道女主选择了谁，推荐大家追"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689349834,"group_id":"7169023845385374720","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9PimYRrL62bdK7/NcKIBL1tK4ru/fYFakSWK0h+lYnn","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/9b66eb3e190840059107caa96e5f794e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776880315&x-signature=qtRBsdNJ8Yip9%2BUt35%2F9DVRm2I4%3D","user_id":"3510121427915342","user_name":"小女爱看言情"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3510121427915342","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7169023845385374720","book_info":{"abstract":"【穿书+万人迷+雄竞+团宠】
夏九音穿书了，穿成了可怜又可恨的替身女配。
要找到隐藏的黑化boss才能回去！
但是高冷的总裁，阴郁乖巧的弟弟，痞帅的校草，温柔解意的学长，谁会是黑化男主？

总裁握住她纤细的手腕，冷声威胁，“九音不乖的话，就会被我关起来。”
校草挑着她的下巴，眯起眼睛霸道道：“你敢不选我？”
弟弟漂亮的眼睛，含着泪水哀求，“姐姐，没有你，我活不下去。”
某学长语气里带着蛊惑“九音真的不选我吗，只有我会让你每天都过情人节。”
她只想完成任务回家，但是却被四个男主缠上是怎么回事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oa4df2661da98870d53f94716bd521e3e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"喵喵吱吱","author_id":"","book_id":"7169023845385374720","book_name":"漂亮宝贝被病娇们囚宠了","book_short_name":"老婆，回家","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e89898","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":94,"name":"团宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=94&name=团宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":473,"name":"豪门世家","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=473&name=豪门世家&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7169033998893580835","read_count":"19444","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"497776"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"340","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,系统,总裁,穿越,团宠,穿书,豪门世家","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7383d73f33b1a31d258e306f4bdac379~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779504539&x-signature=zv%2FqNJtvDlGrkbqEHdqNfIUpW%2BE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2823980690199918","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":""
